series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the minister license application, ordination credentials, cancellation evidence from religious society or congregation, and supporting materials.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Electronic records to be retained for seventy-five (75) years. ; Paper: Paper records to be retained for seventy-five (75) years or, if scanned and checked for completeness, can be destroyed. Supporting materials will be retained until no longer of administrative value, then destroyed., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
